Together with Kumo

Ask billion-dollar predictive questions on your warehouse

Will they churn? Is it fraud? Traditional LLMs can't answer — they treat structured data as tokens. KumoRFM-2 beats PhD data scientists on enterprise data. Just connect your data warehouse and ask in plain English. Eg: Databricks grew lead conversion 1.2x to 6x.

Learn More

Upcoming Events

AI Webinars
Apr
21

Webinar
 

Modernize Your Data Pipelines for AI

 

See how to modernize your stack before it falls behind. You'll learn when CDC is the right move, how to handle complex hybrid environments, and how to deliver high-speed data into Delta Lake and Iceberg via CData Sync.
 
Join us live →
Apr
29

Webinar
 

Spotify's Adoption of Agentic-First Development

 

A deep dive on what agentic-first development actually looks like in practice at scale at Spotify — what broke, and how platform engineering principles had to evolve to make it work.
 
Save your seat →
May
5

Webinar
 

From Vectors to Tensors: Expanding the Possibilities of AI Search

 

A practical primer on what tensors are, why they matter, and what they make possible — with concrete use cases across retail, life sciences, and financial services.
 
Register today →

About this Newsletter

TDS Daily

Each day, we bring you a fresh mix of trending topics, practical tutorials, and thought-provoking reads from across the data-science landscape. Whether you're exploring machine learning, AI, or data engineering, you'll find something to spark new ideas and keep you ahead of the curve.

Ask billion-dollar predictive questions on your warehouse

Will they churn? Is it fraud? Traditional LLMs can't answer — they treat structured data as tokens. KumoRFM-2 beats PhD data scientists on enterprise data. Just connect your data warehouse and ask in plain English. Eg: Databricks grew lead conversion 1.2x to 6x.
